name: geocode
description: Convert addresses to coordinates (geocoding) or coordinates to addresses (reverse geocoding) using OpenStreetMap data. Use for questions like 'coordinates of the White House', 'what is at latitude 45.52 longitude -122.68', 'geocode 1600 Pennsylvania Ave Washington DC'. Worldwide coverage.

input.description: Query parameters as JSON. For forward geocoding: 'q' (address string). For reverse geocoding: 'lat' and 'lon'. Always include 'format' as 'json'. Optional: 'limit' (max results), 'addressdetails' (1 for structured address).

q.description: Address or place name to geocode (e.g. '1600 Pennsylvania Ave Washington DC')

output.description: JSON array of results. Each has 'lat', 'lon', 'display_name' (full address), 'type', and optional 'address' object with street, city, state, country breakdown.
